{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/heads/master/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/glass/white_reflectivity.png
|block_health=2.5
|tool=[[Pickaxe]]
|rotation=stairs
}}

Glass is a transparent colored block.

== Obtaining ==
White glass can be crafted with 8 [[sand]] and 1 [[coal]].
Other glass colors are only obtainable from rare biomes. The glass forest is the most reliable way to get all of the colors.

== Usage ==
Glass is transparent, which allows it to absorb and filter light.

== History ==
* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

[[Category:Colored Blocks]]
[[Category:Blocks]]
